hero.description: Tuguhuza n'abacuruzi ndetse n'amaduka yizewe mu Rwanda hose. Shakisha ikintu cyose ukeneye ubigezweho vuba.

print.description: Ohereza inyandiko zawe mu buryo bworoshye. ku giciro kiza, tunabikugezeho aho uri.

promo_banner.title: Gabanirwa kugeza kuri 50%
promo_banner.description: Ntucikwe n'igabanuka rikomeye ry'uyu mwaka. Gura ubu uzigame amafaranga menshi.

vendors.title: Abacuruzi Bacu Bapimwe
vendors.description: Abacuruzi n'inzobere mu gucapa b'imbere mu gihugu

payment.title: Mobile Money & Ikarita
payment.description: Kwishura birinzwe binyuze kuri MTN MoMo, Airtel & Ikarita

ebm.title: Inyemezabwishyu za EBM
ebm.description: Bona inyemezabwishyu zikomoka kuri RRA ako kanya

delivery.title: Kugezwaho Vuba Aho Uri
delivery.description: Gukwirakwiza ku buryo bwizewe mu Rwanda ryose

community.title: Sangira natwe
community.description: Iyandikishe kugira ngo ubone poromosiyo, ibishya, n'ubutumwa bwihariye muri imeyili yawe.

daily_deals.title: Ibigabanijwe by'uyu munsi
daily_deals.subtitle: Garuka vuba ube ari wowe uherukwa n'ibigabanijwe bitaha!
daily_deals.no_deals_desc: Garuka vuba! Ibigabanijwe bishya bishyirwaho kenshi. Iyandikishe mu butumwa bwacu kugira ngo ube uwa mbere ubimenya!
daily_deals.default_desc: Ibigabanuko bikomeye ku bicuruzwa byiza. Ntucikwe!

print_portal.title: Ihuriro ryo gucapa kuri interineti
print_portal.subtitle: Serivisi zo gucapa kinyamwuga n'izindi nyandiko. Ohereza inyandiko none tugukorere ku giciro gitoya uyu munsi.

how_it_works.title: Uko bikora
how_it_works.step1: Ohereza inyandiko zawe (PDF, Word, cyangwa amashusho) hano.
how_it_works.step2: Ugurisha azasuzuma inyandiko zawe maze ashyireho igiciro cya nyuma.
how_it_works.step3: Uzabona ubutumwa bukumenyesha kwishura maze inyandiko zawe zigacapwe.

form.editing_helper: Nkeneye ko iduka ritunganya iyi nyandiko
form.instructions_placeholder: Urugero: Kuri kumpande zombi, uburyo bwo kuzihambira, aho zagugezwa...

guidelines.title: Amabwiriza
guidelines.formats: Inyandiko zemewe: PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG.
guidelines.large_files: Ku nyandiko nini cyane, ushobora gushyira link yo muri cloud mu miterere y'ibyifuzo.

shop.title: Ibicuruzwa byose
shop.no_products_desc: Nta gicuruzwa twabonye kijyanye n'ibyo washatse. Gerageza guhindura ibyo washatse cyangwa icyiciro.

footer.description: Ihuriro ryawe ry'ibicuruzwa byiza cyane. Ibice byatoranijwe, poromosiyo zidasanzwe, na serivisi nziza cyane.
footer.address: Inyubako yegereye ibiro by'akarere ka Gicumbi (Eudiose Building)

gift_cards.hero_desc: Tanga amahitamo meza uhawe ikarita y'impano ya Kuri Macye. Yohereze ako kanya kuri imeyili cyangwa uyigenerere igihe gikwiriye.
gift_cards.choose_amount_desc: Hitamo mu giciro cyagenwe cyangwa wihiyirire icyawe
gift_cards.manage_card_desc: Injiza kode y'umwihariko y'ikarita yawe kugira ngo usuzume agaciro gasigaye cyangwa urebe imiterere yayo.
gift_cards.toast_cart_fail: Gushyira ikarita y'impano mu gatebo byaranze
gift_cards.modal_recipient_helper: Tuzohereza iyi karita y'impano kuri iyi imeyili nyuma yo kuyigura.

track_order.hero_desc: Injiza nimero y'ikomande yawe (Order ID) hepfo kugira ngo urebe aho igeze mu buryo bw'ako kanya.
track_order.error_not_found: Ntabwo twashoboye kubona ikomande ifite iyo nimero. Nyamuneka yisuzume maze ugerageze kandi.

stages.placed_desc: Ikomande yawe yakiriwe neza kandi itegereje gutunganywa.
stages.processing_desc: Turimo gutegura ibyo watumije kugira ngo bikugerereho.
stages.delivering_desc: Ibyo watumije biri mu nzira bikugana!
stages.delivered_desc: Ibyo watumije byagejejwe ku mukiriya neza.

blog.hero_desc: Inama, amakuru, n'ibitekerezo ku bikorwa byo gucapa n'uburyo bwo kwagura ubucuruzi bwawe.
blog.error_load: Gushaka amakuru byaranze. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone mukanya.
blog.toast_subscribe_success: Wiyandikishije neza mu makuru yacu yo kuri imeyili!
blog.no_posts: Nta makuru ahuye n'ibyo washatse twabonye.
blog.newsletter_desc: Bona inama zo gucapa n'ibishya byose byoherejwe kuri imeyili yawe.

wishlist.hero_desc: Bika ibyo ukunda kugira ngo uzabigure nyuma kandi ukomeze kubikurikirana.
wishlist.empty_desc: Bisa nk'aho nta kintu wigeze ushyira mu byo wifuza. Tangira urebe mu iduka ryacu ubonemo ibyo ukunda!

cart.title: ahari ibyo wahisemo guhaha
cart.description: Suzuma ibyo wahisemo, ugire ibyo uhindura, maze ukomeze kwishyura.
cart.empty_desc: Igihe ni iki ngo ushake ibicuruzwa bitangaje ubyuzuze agatebo kawe!

about.hero_desc: Turi urubuga rwiza rw'ubucuruzi bwa interineti rurimo abacuruzi benshi ruyoborwa na Ubaka Tech, ruhuza abacuruzi bigenga n'abakiriya bashaka ibicuruzwa na serivisi byiza mu Rwanda.
about.story_desc1: Kuri Macye yavutse ku ntego yoroshye: guha ubushobozi abacuruzi bo hafi no koroheza guhaha kuri interineti kuri buri wese. Yatangijwe nk'igicuruzwa cya mbere cy'indashyikirwa cya Ubaka Tech, ubu imaze gukura iba ihuriro ryagutse rihuza abacuruzi batandukanye n'abakiriya babarirwa mu bihumbi mu Rwanda.
about.story_desc2: Twemera ko gushyigikira abacuruzi bigenga biganisha ku mikurire myiza mu gihe duhaye abaguzi serivisi zihuse, zizewe kandi zinoze. Binyuze mu guhuza amaduka ya kijyambere n'izindi serivisi zihariye, duhuza umuyoboro hagati y'abacuruzi n'ababagana.

values_list.innovation_desc: Turangwa no guhora tunoza ibikoresho by'ubucuruzi, uburyo bwo kwishura, no kugeza ibicuruzwa ku bakiriya.
values_list.quality_desc: Tugumana ibipimo byo hejuru ku rubuga rwacu, haba ku bacuruzi twemera no kuri serivisi duha abakiriya.
values_list.partnership_desc: Dukorana bya hafi n'abacuruzi nk'abafatanyabikorwa mu kubashyigikira ngo bakure kandi wagure ubucuruzi bwabo.

about.team_desc: Abahanga bategura kandi bakora iby'iri ihuriro ry'ubucuruzi.
about.cta_desc: Fatanya n'abaguzi n'abagurisha babarirwa mu bihumbi bizera Kuri Macye mu bucuruzi bwabo. Vumbura ibicuruzwa byiza cyangwa utangire kugurisha uyu munsi.

contact.hero_desc: Turi hano kugufasha. Twoherereze ubutumwa kandi tugusubize bidatinze.

faq.hero_desc: Ibyerekeye ibicuruzwa na serivisi zacu byose uzabona hano.
faq.still_desc: Niba utabonanye igisubizo washakaga, itsinda ryacu ry'inkunga iri hano kukufasha.

items.a: Itangwa risanzwe rifata iminsi 3-5 y'akazi mu Rwanda. Watwandikira kugira ngo tubone hamwe ibirebana n'aho uri.

items.q: Politiki yanyu yo gusubiza ibicuruzwa ni iyihe?
items.a: Twakira gusubiza ibicuruzwa mu minsi 30 nyuma yo kugura. Igicuruzwa ntikigomba gukoreshwa kandi gihuze n'agashya. Twandikire itsinda ryacu kugira ngo utangire gusubiza.
Nyuma yo kohereza ikomande yawe, uzahabwa numero yo gukurikirana kuri imeli. Ukoreshe kandi urunigi 'Kurikirana Ikomande' uri munsi w'urupapuro.
Yego, tugeza ibicuruzwa mu bihugu byinshi ku isi. Igiciro n'igihe bigenda binyuranye ukurikije aho uri.
Ushobora kugera ku tsinda ryacu kuri imeli: ishfabzele2@gmail.com cyangwa uhamagare +250 789 079 978 mu masaha y'akazi.

items.q: Nabyaza ute umuguzi kuri Kuri Macye?
items.a: Ushobora kwiyandikisha nk'umugurisha binyuze ku rugero 'Bwera Umugurisha' mu gikubitiro. Itsinda ryacu rizasuzuma inyandiko yawe rikasubize mu masaha 48.

careersPage.hero_title: Ngwino wifatanye natwe mu kubaka ihahiro rigezweho mu Rwanda
careersPage.hero_desc: Turi itsinda rifite intego yo guha ubushobozi abashushanyi bacu, inzobere mu gucapa, n'abacuruzi. Shaka imyanya ifunguye ufatanye natwe.
careersPage.culture_desc: Ibyo tugenderaho mu byemezo byacu n'intego y'iterambere rya buri munsi
careersPage.val_emp_desc: Turandura icyuho cya tekinoroji ku bacuruzi, amaduka y'icapa, n'abashushanyi tubaha imbuga n'amasitemu y'ubucuruzi (POS) yikora.
careersPage.val_qty_desc: Twaba dutanga amapaketi y'icapa yihariye, amashyiga yagezweho, cyangwa inyandikorugero z'irangamuntu, ireme rihoraho naryo riraturanga.
careersPage.val_grn_desc: Turwanira sisitemu z'ikwirakwiza rirambye, dushyira imbere ingufu zitangiza ibidukikije n'imirasire y'izuba.
careersPage.opp_desc: Fatanya natwe gutera imbere mu bucuruzi n'ikoranabuhanga uvuye i Kigali
careersPage.no_roles_desc: Ongera ugerageze nyuma cyangwa wiyandikishe ku makuru yacu kugira ngo uhabwe andi makuru.
careersPage.applied_msg: Gusaba kwanyu kwakiriwe neza! Itsinda ryacu ry'abakozi rizakuvugisha mu minsi 3 y'akazi.
careersPage.err_failed: Kugerageza gusaba byanze. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze.
careersPage.placeholder_cover: Tubwire ibigufataho, kuki ushaka kwinjira muri Kuri Macye, n'uburyo ubumenyi bwawe buhuye n'uyu mwanya...
